chapter_title.ar: باب فِيهِ نُكَتٌ وَ نُتَفٌ مِنَ التَّنْزِيلِ فِي الْوَلَايَةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 108 – Points and pickings from the Revelation regarding the Wilayah

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (27/ 5)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (27/ 5)
text: نَزَلَ جَبْرَئِيلُ ( عليه السلام ) بِهَذِهِ الْآيَةِ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) هَكَذَا بِئْسَمَا اشْتَرَوْا بِهِ أَنْفُسَهُمْ أَنْ يَكْفُرُوا بِما أَنْزَلَ اللَّهُ فِي عَلِيٍّ بَغْياً .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Al Barqy, from his father, from Muhammad Bin Sinan, from Ammar Bin Marwan, from Munakhhal, from Jabir,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’farasws having said: ‘Jibraeelas descended with this Verse like this [2:90] Evil is that for which they have sold their souls - that they should deny what Allah has Revealed regarding Aliasws, in rebellion’.
en.sarwar: 25. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad al-Barqi from his father Muhammad ibn Sinan from ‘Ammar ibn Marwan from Munakhkhal from Jabir from abu Ja‘far (a.s.) who has said the following. “Jibril brought this verse to Muhammad (s.a). “Evil is that for which they have sold their souls: They have refused to accept God’s revelations (about Leadership with Divine Authority of Ali (a.s.)) in rebellion. .” [2:90]”
